hooks.command: bash -lc 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && bash scripts/codex-hook-adapter.sh session-start'
bash -lc 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && bash scripts/codex-hook-adapter.sh pre-tool-use'
bash -lc 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && bash scripts/codex-hook-adapter.sh post-tool-use'
bash -lc 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && bash scripts/codex-hook-adapter.sh session-stop'
